poll_query.replay_from_id: required for replay mode, inclusive lower bound

ml.resume: read checkpoint endpoint, then poll with consumer=ml
ml.replay: poll with mode=replay and replay_from_id; do not move checkpoint until ack
ml.idempotency_rule: deduplicate by idempotency_key and/or max acked offset

graph.resume: read checkpoint endpoint, then poll with consumer=graph
graph.replay: poll with mode=replay and replay_from_id; projector applies events idempotently
graph.idempotency_rule: deduplicate by idempotency_key and graph upsert keys
